methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series G → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.25x) to $35M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 1 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 20 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

private.name: Shield AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series G), post-money $5.6B

data.narrative:
Rebellion Defense is a Series G defense and security company that has raised $150M to date. The comparable universe for Defense & Security spans 2 public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers including Shield AI, Anduril Industries, and Saronic. However, a narrow peer-median approach proved inapplicable due to insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables within similar valuation tiers; only 1 same-stage and 1 adjacent-stage peer were identified, falling short of the 3-datapoint threshold required for robust multiples-based valuation.

The stage-progression method is applicable and forms the primary triangulation basis. Using total capital raised ($150M) as a proxy baseline yields $35M, to which a 1.25x Series G step-up multiplier is applied, implying a $44M valuation. This single-method approach generates a triangulated range of $37M (low), $44M (median), and $50M (high), anchored to typical institutional step-ups at advanced stages.

The $44M median is supported by stage-progression mechanics but carries material uncertainty due to methodological limitation—absence of robust peer multiples prevents cross-validation via revenue or EBITDA comparables. Key uncertainties include actual revenue scale, customer concentration, and timing to Series H. This range should be treated as indicative pending disclosure of operational metrics or expanded comparable data.
